creator: winter@jurai.net
text:
On Wed, 28 Mar 2001 pgreer@1st.net wrote:
> Trying install on IBM PS/2 9590-DLG. Booting from floppy yields this:
> 
> <console output>
> 
> disk error 0x4 (lba0x10)
> disk error 0x4 (lba0x10)
> No /boot/loader

This is a problem with the 2.88M floppy drive.  I'm not quite sure what
the solution is other than to use a 1.44M drive or a 1.2M.
